arts.ttl: Celta Vigo vs Real Madrid, 2024 La Liga: Predicted lineups
arts.sum: Real Madrid are kicking off what could be a season-defining stretch of the schedule with a visit to face Celta in Vigo. Real Madrid predicted XI: Courtois, Vazquez, Militao, Rudiger, Mendy, Tchouameni, Valverde, Bellingham, Rodrygo, Vinicius, Mbappe.

arts.ttl: Carlo Ancelotti confirms Real Madrid's right-back plans amid Trent Alexander-Arnold links
arts.sum: Reds right-back has been heavily linked with Spanish giants

arts.ttl: Saturday's La Liga predictions including Celta Vigo vs. Real Madrid
arts.sum: Sports Mole provides score predictions and previews for all of today's La Liga fixtures, including Celta Vigo vs. Real Madrid.

arts.ttl: Report: How Man Utd can beat Real Madrid to Alphonso Davies transfer
arts.sum: Alphonso Davies would listen to an approach from Manchester United if they are prepared to meet his wage demands, a report has revealed. United offered the young defender a higher salary than Madrid officials were prepared to pay, although that stance came from the fact Yoro was entering the final year of his contract and would have been available on a free transfer in 2025, as is the case with Davies.

arts.ttl: Trent Alexander-Arnold fututre: Liverpool boss Arne Slot breaks silence on Real Madrid transfer links
arts.sum: Liverpool head coach Arne Slot addresses speculation linking Trent Alexander-Arnold with a move to Real Madrid in 2025.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid boss Carlo Ancelotti reveals truth behind England job links
arts.sum: Real Madrid manager Carlo Ancelotti reveals the truth behind speculation linking him with the England manager's job.

arts.ttl: Arne Slot makes Trent Alexander-Arnold contract vow amid fresh Real Madrid transfer links
arts.sum: Liverpool head coach Arne Slot is not worried about Trent Alexander-Arnold's focus after speculation this week emerged from Spain that Real Madrid are ready to make a move for the defender

arts.ttl: Guirassy's late goal earns Dortmund a Bundesliga win before Real Madrid test in Champions League
arts.sum: Serhou Guirassy scored late as Borussia Dortmund beat promoted St. Pauli 2-1 in the Bundesliga on Friday, easing some pressure on the club before facing Real Madrid. Dortmund next visits Madrid in the Champions League on Tuesday.

arts.ttl: Carlo Ancelotti confirms injured Real Madrid star is close to return after retirement rumours
arts.sum: Alaba became the third Madrid player to be struck down by an anterior cruciate ligament (ACL) injury last season, sustaining serious damage to his knee in a 4-1 victory over Villarreal in December 2023. Real Madrid manager Carlo Ancelotti quashed any rumours of David Alaba's imminent retirement by revealing that the injured defender is nearing a return to full fitness.

arts.ttl: Carlo Ancelotti offers exciting Kylian Mbappe update after international break
arts.sum: Real Madrid manager Carlo Ancelotti has claimed Kylian Mbappe used the international break to become "a different player" compared to the one who struggled across his first few months in Spain. Kylian Mbappe is a different player to the one he was before the break.
